services.title: Pet Wellness Exam
services.description: Comprehensive annual checkups for dogs and cats, including physical examination, health history review, and preventative care planning.

services.title: Livestock Consultation
services.description: On-farm visits for cattle, goats, sheep, and other livestock. Includes health assessment, treatment, and farm management advice.

services.title: Complete Vaccinations
services.description: Core vaccines including Rabies, Parvo, DHLPP, and Feline boosters tailored to your pet's lifestyle and age.

services.title: Surgical Services
services.description: Professional surgical care including spaying, neutering, wound repair, and tumor removal with complete anesthesia management.

services.title: Dental Care
services.description: Professional teeth cleaning, extractions, and oral health assessments. Includes pre-operative bloodwork and pain management.

services.title: Microchipping & ID
services.description: Permanent identification microchipping for lost pet recovery. Quick, painless procedure with registration included.

services.title: Farm Health Program
services.description: Comprehensive annual health monitoring for farms including disease prevention, breeding consultation, and feed advisory.

services.title: Dermatology Services
services.description: Treatment for skin allergies, infections, parasites, and skin diseases using advanced diagnostic tools.

services.title: Laboratory & Diagnostics
services.description: In-house blood work, urinalysis, X-rays, ultrasound, and parasitic testing for accurate diagnosis.

services.title: Emergency Care
services.description: 24/7 emergency veterinary services for trauma, poisoning, difficulty breathing, and other life-threatening conditions.

services.title: Pet Grooming
services.description: Professional grooming services including baths, nail trimming, hair cuts, and ear cleaning.

services.title: Breeding Consultation
services.description: Expert advice on breeding programs, genetics, nutrition, and herd management for livestock improvement.
